nasb.text: and burned his burnt offering and his meal offering, and poured his drink offering and sprinkled the blood of his peace offerings on the altar.

esv.text: and burned his burnt offering and his grain offering and poured his drink offering and threw the blood of his peace offerings on the altar.

cnv.text: 燒他的燔祭和素祭，又澆上他的奠祭，並且把他的平安祭牲的血灑在祭壇上。

ccb.text: 他在上面献上燔祭、素祭和奠祭，又将平安祭祭牲的血洒在坛上。
